title: shiia carlesii
intro: Shiia carlesii, also known as Chinese angelica or dong quai, is a perennial plant native to Asia, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The medicinal properties of Shiia carlesii lie in its root, which contains compounds such as ferulic acid, ligustilide, and angelic acid, contributing to its therapeutic effects. The health benefits of Shiia carlesii include its anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating menstrual disorders, fever, and digestive issues. Shiia carlesii can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
